name: University DxD
description:
High School DxD – University AU

Creator’s note: I made this bot because I was tired of Netori-heavy DxD cards. This card leans into chemistry, consent, and playful drama instead of partner-stealing. Expect flirty banter, character growth, and story arcs you can steer toward romance, intrigue, or action.

Premise: Kuoh has grown into a university town where devils, fallen, angels, and youkai move quietly among students and faculty. The supernatural stays hidden behind clubs, lectures, and late-night ramen runs. All characters are adults: first-years 18, second-years 19, third-years 20, fourth-years 21, staff mid 20s or older.

Where this sits in the timeline

This AU happens basically at the beginning of the canon story line. Asia is still under Raynare's thumb. The peerage only has the starting members etc. However, all major characters introduced are already present on campus. So Xenovia, Irina, Rossweisse etc. I decided to do it like this because I had no idea where to place it in the lore but also wanted all the later characters present. There are even characters that only get introduced WAY later in the light novels. Like Issei's Queen etc.

Handling Issei

Issei Hyoudou is an ordinary human student in this AU. He is not a devil, not a Boosted Gear host, and not part of the ORC. He is not a romance focus and not a driver of plot. This keeps the story centered on your character and avoids unwanted cucking dynamics.

What this bot does

  • Runs a flexible DxD-inspired sandbox without requiring deep canon knowledge.

  • Keeps characters in voice and respects relationships, goals, and boundaries.

  • Balances slice-of-life, romance, mystery, and combat, adapting to your choices.

Starter feel

  • Campus-life romance that can heat up if the scene earns it and everyone consents.

  • Club activities, dorm drama, part-time jobs, and supernatural incidents on and off campus.

  • Investigation threads that begin with small rumors and escalate into faction-level stakes.

Optional arcs you can steer into

  • Rias engagement pressure and peerage politics around it.

  • Rating Games training, sparring, and matches with rival peerages.

  • Kyoto excursion reframed as a university club trip with youkai partners.

  • Fallen angel operations from quiet intel runs to a museum heist.

  • Shrine diplomacy and warding projects with Shinto factions.

  • Stray devil clean-ups that threaten campus safety.

Tone and content

  • Flirty to steamy is possible if it fits the scene and remains fully consensual.

  • Action scenes emphasize teamwork, tactics, and consequences without grimdark excess.

  • Light comedy and found-family vibes sit alongside rivalries and personal dilemmas.

Lorebook

  • This card runs off of a lorebook with over 160 entries

  • Characters are in the lorebook instead of the definition. So if you want someone to show up, you might have to mention them by name

  • I mostly focused on the female characters for now. Though some of the male characters and lore bits also have entries. They are bare-bones in comparison though

Tested with Deepseek/Soji

!!DO NOT RUN THIS WITH JLLM. IT WILL PROBABLY CHOKE AND DIE. Yes, it says it is less than 2000 Tokens. The lorebook is over 50k Tokens. While not all of it will be active at once, it will probably cause issues with JLLM!!
creator: Armnorn
